message:
fix(agents): validate tools and agents fields are arrays in markdown parser

Reject scalar values for tools/agents frontmatter fields (e.g.
"tools: read_file" instead of "tools:\n  - read_file") with a
clear error message, preventing malformed specs where spread
would iterate individual characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
